en.title: About PVHS Pathways
en.subtitle: Our mission, our story, our vision.
en.body:
PVHS Pathways was built on a simple realization: not every student's path looks the same.
For years, students have been told that college is the only road to success. But college isn't for everyone — and that's okay. Career and Technical Education (CTE) exists as a powerful alternative, supported at the federal level through Carl Perkins funding and at the state level here in Nevada through competitive and formula awards to local school districts.
Pahrump Valley High School offers eight CTE sequences — from Cybersecurity to Culinary Arts — giving students real skills, industry credentials, and a head start on careers that matter.
But there was a problem. When Nye County School District surveyed graduates one year after completing a CTE sequence, most students reported pursuing education or work outside of the industry they had studied. Students were putting in the time, passing the tests, and gaining real experience — then walking away from it.
That gap is what inspired this project. PVHS Pathways exists to change that number by making it easier for students to see where their sequence can actually take them.

es.title: Acerca de PVHS Pathways
es.subtitle: Nuestra misión, nuestra historia, nuestra visión.
es.body: Escribe tu sección Acerca de aquí. Cuéntales a los visitantes quién eres, qué es PVHS Pathways y por qué este proyecto es importante.
